mapper.sql: schedule_item_id AS scheduleItemId, trip_id AS tripId, place_id AS placeId, created_by_user_id AS createdByUserId, day_no AS dayNo, schedule_date AS scheduleDate, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, title, memo, sort_order AS sortOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_MEMBER tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.invite_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND tm.member_role = 'EDITOR' WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND (t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR tm.trip_member_id IS NOT NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE_ITEM ( trip_id, place_id, created_by_user_id, day_no, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, title, memo, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{item.tripId}, #{item.placeId}, #{item.createdByUserId}, #{item.dayNo}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.title}, #{item.memo}, #{item.sortOrder} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM SCHEDULE_ITEM WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, start_time ASC, sort_order ASC, schedule_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE_ITEM SET place_id = #{item.placeId}, created_by_user_id = #{item.createdByUserId}, day_no = #{item.dayNo}, schedule_date = #{item.scheduleDate}, start_time = #{item.startTime}, end_time = #{item.endTime}, title = #{item.title}, memo = #{item.memo}, sort_order = #{item.sortOrder} WHERE trip_id = #{item.tripId} AND schedule_item_id = #{item.scheduleItemId}
